evidence: Implemented Phase 6 agent tool upgrades: added IndexStatus, TopologyMap, and TopologyMapRequest contracts; RagCodeEngine now supports refreshIndex, indexStatus, and topologyMap; MCP definitions and callTool handlers expose refresh_index, index_status, and topology_map; tests cover tool listing, freshness counts, refresh clearing stale/pending state, and topology_map owner/topology evidence. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.
